Localization.Description: Attempt to change access rights to a function

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed access rights to function "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to change access rights to function "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}."
User {subject.account.name} is changing access rights to function "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}
